# nullcloud_cluster (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud Kubernetes cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_cluster" "example" {
  name       = "my-cluster"
  version    = "1.30"
  node_count = 3
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the Kubernetes cluster.
- `node_count` (Number) Number of worker nodes (minimum 1).
- `version` (String) Kubernetes version (e.g. 1.30).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
